full_description: Habit Tracker is a simple app that helps users build positive habits and break negative ones. It allows users to set reminders and track their progress. With Habit Tracker, you can set daily, weekly, or monthly goals for yourself and receive notifications to stay on track. The app also provides a calendar view to see your progress over time, helping you identify patterns and make adjustments to achieve your goals. Whether you want to start exercising regularly, read more books, or practice a new skill, Habit Tracker is the perfect tool to help you stay motivated and consistent.
